name: quantummint
description: Digital Money Generation Platform with Microservices Architecture

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm run install-services && npm run install-frontend
scripts.install-services: cd api-gateway && npm install && cd ../auth-service && npm install && cd ../money-generation && npm install && cd ../transaction-service && npm install && cd ../payment-integration && npm install && cd ../kyc-service && npm install
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:money" "npm run start:transaction" "npm run start:payment" "npm run start:kyc" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.test: npm run test:services && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:services: cd api-gateway && npm test && cd ../auth-service && npm test && cd ../money-generation && npm test && cd ../transaction-service && npm test && cd ../payment-integration && npm test && cd ../kyc-service && npm test
scripts.build: npm run build:services && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:services: cd api-gateway && npm run build && cd ../auth-service && npm run build && cd ../money-generation && npm run build && cd ../transaction-service && npm run build && cd ../payment-integration && npm run build && cd ../kyc-service && npm run build

author: QuantumMint Team
